warnings: Dropped 2 non-scored row(s) worth 0 points (Dress Code Penalty, Late Arrival Penalty). Check they really aren't scored.
_review.note: Machine-parsed from the official rating sheet. plan.md F3: nobody may be graded against this until a human confirms it.
_review.paraphrase_note: Descriptions and level descriptors are restated in our own words (plan.md §20). Criterion names and every point value are exactly as published on the official rating sheet.

criteria.name: Demonstrates understanding of the event topic in presentation

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The participant showed no comprehension of the event's subject matter, or addressed an entirely different topic.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant's grasp of the subject was not consistently aligned with the event's official guidelines.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The presentation consistently showed an understanding of the assigned subject.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The presentation consistently incorporated relevant professional vocabulary.

criteria.name: Describes the purpose with a logical sequence of ideas

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: Neither a clear purpose nor a coherent progression of ideas was evident.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Either the purpose was articulated, or the ideas followed a logical order, but not both.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The presentation's aim was explained through a well-ordered series of thoughts.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The presentation's objective was clearly established and presented with a highly coherent flow of ideas.

criteria.name: Summarizes information from the event topic and identifies recommendations

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No overview of information or suggested actions were presented.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: An overview or suggestions were offered, but a detailed plan was missing.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The information was summarized effectively, and sensible recommendations were formulated.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The summary established clear and logical links to every part of the event's topic throughout the entire presentation, and practical recommendations were proposed.

criteria.name: Technology demonstrates proper formatting, design elements, and business presentation features

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No technological tools or design principles were applied.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The formatting and design choices were appropriate and aligned with the presentation's theme.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The visual aids utilized appropriate formatting and design components.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The presentation's formatting and design effectively highlighted the interpretation of the subject matter.

criteria.name: Uses suitable and accurate statements of information in presentation

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No references were provided for the information presented.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Evidence from sources or references was rarely provided to back up claims.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Statements were typically supported by credible and appropriate sources and materials.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Strong and convincing evidence from authoritative and relevant sources and materials was used to substantiate all claims.

criteria.name: Statements are well-organized and clearly stated

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The competitor(s) did not appear ready to present.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The competitor(s) were prepared, but the presentation's progression lacked coherence.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The presentation progressed in a logical order.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The presentation flowed logically, and all points were clearly articulated and well-structured.

criteria.name: Consistently displays confidence, poised body language, engaging eye contact, and effective voice projection.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: None of the specified presentation skills were exhibited.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: One or two of the listed skills (confidence, body language, eye contact, or voice projection) were demonstrated.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Three of the listed skills (confidence, body language, eye contact, or voice projection) were demonstrated.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: All specified skills were demonstrated, significantly improving the overall presentation.

criteria.name: Demonstrates the ability to effectively answer questions

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The participant was unable to provide answers to questions.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant did not respond to questions, or their responses were entirely irrelevant.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant gave incomplete or unclear answers, indicating a limited grasp of the subject.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant answered most questions accurately and clearly, demonstrating a sufficient understanding.

criteria.name: Adherence to Competitive Events Guidelines
criteria.description: The presentation's execution was in line with the guidelines, meaning all specified criteria were met. This includes using only permitted technology (adhering to size limits; maximum of two devices, with only one facing judges at a time); the presentation's content matched the assigned topic; professional boundaries were maintained during setup (no interaction with judges); no materials were left behind after the presentation; links or QR codes were displayed appropriately (not clicked or scanned by judges); audio was presented without external speakers (during the preliminary round); and the use of food or live animals was avoided.

levels.label: Competitor(s) Did Not Follow Guidelines
levels.descriptor: One or more of the established guidelines were not adhered to.

levels.label: Execution Aligned with Guidelines
levels.descriptor: All specified requirements were fulfilled.
